---
title: "PyMOL Guides"
sidebar: pymol-sidebar
---

These guides provide an introduction to molecular visualization and scripting with PyMOL 3.

| Guide | Description |
|---|---|
| [Biomolecular visualization with PyMOL 3](pymol_guide_1.qmd) | Introduction to the PyMOL GUI, molecular representations, atom selections, and making publication-quality figures. |
| [Commands and scripting in PyMOL 3](pymol_guide_2.qmd) | Using the PyMOL command line and scripts for advanced visualization, including a full reference card. |
